scripts.build: dotnet build apps/api/MonorepoBackend.sln && corepack pnpm --dir apps/web build
scripts.test: dotnet test apps/api/MonorepoBackend.sln && corepack pnpm --dir apps/web test
scripts.test:coverage: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File apps/api/test-coverage.ps1 && corepack pnpm --dir apps/web test:coverage
